title: I Protect My Wealth with Peace and Clarity
subtitle: An affirmation for bringing a calm, confident energy to inheritance and wealth planning
excerpt: A brief affirmation from the Day 73 theme of a 12-week money programme. The statement names the internal state (peace, clarity, confidence) that makes wealth protection planning possible rather than paralysing.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Day 73 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025, ISBN 9798276631448).

content.text: A brief affirmation from the Day 73 theme of a 12-week money programme. Day 73 centres on releasing the fear that taxes or legal systems will erode inherited wealth. The affirmation names the internal state that makes planning possible: peace, clarity, confidence.
Say it before any planning conversation or financial review. Three times, hand on heart. Notice whether it shifts the tone of what comes next.
Peace, clarity, and confidence guide how I protect and structure my wealth.
Adapted from the Day 73 affirmation in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom & Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
